headline: Sentiment down 60% this week, fears declining
key_insights: Frustrations trending down 14% over 7 days (moderate momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 139 quotes and 109 at strong intensity - people are expressing deep anger and dissatisfaction today.

• While still high within the 50-day range, frustration levels dropped from yesterday's peak but remain well above typical levels.

• Both fears and optimism stayed consistently low, with optimism remaining deeply suppressed near its historical bottom.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
